sqlSchema:
CREATE TABLE "obj_71531a52_1e14_479c_bf1f_b7726d76dfe8" (

    "name" TEXT,
    "columns" TEXT[] NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}',

    "on_delete" TEXT,

    CONSTRAINT "pk_obj_71531a52_1e14_479c_bf1f_b7726d76dfe8" PRIMARY KEY (item_id),
    CONSTRAINT "fk_71531a521e14479c_item" FOREIGN KEY (item_id) REFERENCES items(id)
)
